body_txt: You can tell an enemy force is downright evil when its members don't even support each other. Sure they have a common goal, but it's every mook for himself . One mook will get injured and go down, the other will mock him and/or kill him. But why stop there? Use his body as a shield! Steal his stuff! Desecrate his body! This trope is that an evil mook will not help a fallen comrade. It doesn't count if the one is trying to help the other but cannot. May result in If You Die, I Call Your Stuff if the other mooks also loot the body or take his stuff before he dies; Dying Alone if they simply leave him. Compare Enemy Civil War and We ARE Struggling Together . Contrast with A Friend in Need , I Cannot Self-Terminate and I Will Only Slow You Down . Closely related to No Honor Among Thieves .
